meaning: n.女巫,女算命师,(古罗马或古希腊的)女预言家
examples: Sibyl Vane tossed her head and laughed.
I'm Sibyl ; I'll finish the case study.
The Texas branch of Americans for Prosperity gave its Blogger of the Year Award to a young woman named Sibyl West.
But in this movie Duras comes off as a sibyl without vision.
